overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking along a futuristic urban waterfront. The scene features elevated monorail tracks, neon-lit buildings, wet pavement, and moderate traffic under an overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath elevated monorail tracks, passing street lamps and digital signage

notable_agents.action: character in yellow jacket walks past the camera from right to left at close proximity

entered.detail: large curved metal highway structure with support pillars spanning across the scene
metal safety railing along the edge of a waterway with greenish water below
tall cylindrical glass building with reflective blue-green windows
large building with illuminated 'Republic Way' signage and neon accents
large digital screen displaying purple and white graphics on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail structure. To the left is a canal with metal railings, while futuristic glass skyscrapers rise in the distance. The right side features the Republic Way building with digital billboards, and vehicles move along the multi-lane road. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket passes by closely around the 18-second mark.

events.description: ego steps onto crosswalk and crosses the multi-lane street while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting briefly, then crossing the street to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road, stopping at the intersection to allow crossing

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt road surface
tall pole with red traffic light and yellow-black striped base
cluster of contemporary high-rise buildings with glass and steel facades

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the environment opens into a wider intersection. The camera approaches a crosswalk marked with white stripes, passing a traffic light pole on the left. The elevated highway structure shifts toward the right side of the frame as the character crosses the street around 38 seconds, with a black sedan visible on the road. Modern glass buildings become more prominent on the left side.

events.description: completes crossing the street and continues along the opposite waterfront sidewalk with parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved waterfront path, passing rows of parked futuristic vehicles

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including white and silver futuristic sedans along the curb
large building with dark industrial exterior and horizontal neon lighting strips

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character walks along a curved waterfront sidewalk. The right side now features a row of parked futuristic cars and an industrial building with neon accent lighting, while the canal remains visible on the left. The elevated monorail tracks continue overhead as the path curves gently, with the wet pavement reflecting the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic urban waterfront that transitions from a narrow corridor beneath a monorail into a wide city intersection and finally along a curved industrial promenade. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk flanked by a canal and the Republic Way building, moving past digital billboards and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket. As the character advances, the environment opens into a broad intersection where the camera passes a traffic light and crosses white stripes toward a cluster of prominent glass buildings. The scene then shifts as the character moves beyond the crosswalk, with the elevated highway structure sliding to the right of the frame. Finally, the path curves along the waterfront, passing a row of parked futuristic cars and an industrial building accented with neon lighting under a reflective, overcast sky.
